tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def in_progress_issues (filter #(= (:state %) "in_progress") linear_issues))

(def by_assignee (group-by :assignee in_progress_issues))

(def sorted_by_count (sort-by (fn [[assignee issues]] (count issues)) > by_assignee))

(def top_assignee (first sorted_by_count))

{:assignee (first top_assignee) :count (count (second top_assignee))}"}
